items.title: Guard against infinite loop when no training shards exist, fix README…
items.summary: Guard against infinite loop when no training shards exist, fix README typo Add assertion after filtering val_path from parquet_paths for the "train" split so an empty list fails fast instead of spinning in a silent infinite loop. Also remove stray article "a" in README ("a three files" → "three files"). Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6

items.title: Include beginner's guide to neural networks
items.summary: Include beginner's guide to neural networks Added a resource link for beginners in neural networks.

items.title: fix NaN loss not caught by fast-fail check
items.summary: fix NaN loss not caught by fast-fail check `train_loss_f > 100` silently passes on NaN because IEEE 754 NaN comparisons always return False. When an agent experiment produces NaN (e.g. from an aggressive LR change), the run wastes the full 5-minute budget instead of failing fast. `not (x 100 and NaN with no added complexity. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
